data.text: marked by or exhibiting a fawning attentiveness
examples: was always followed around by his obsequious minions
There are no hushed voices, white tablecloths or obsequious waiters.
Not pleasing others enough amounts to surliness, pleasing too much makes one obsequious …

enrichment.etymology: Middle English, compliant, from Latin obsequiosus, from obsequium compliance, from obsequi to comply, from ob- toward + sequi to follow ,
